headline.purpose: View titles, modal headers, and section names. Present and authoritative, not display-sized.

body.purpose: All prose: journal entries, Sage messages, card content, task descriptions. Max 65ch on desktop.

label.purpose: Navigation, form labels, stat headings, timestamps. Sentence case only — never uppercase tracked.

shadows.name: glow-dark
shadows.purpose: Applied to coach bubbles and Sage UI in dark shell. Warm and alive.

shadows.name: glow-light
shadows.purpose: Hover and focus warmth on light surfaces. Subtle — a breath, not a spotlight.

shadows.name: shadow-soft
shadows.purpose: Cards and panels on light surfaces at rest. Ambient, never decorative.

shadows.name: shadow-lift
shadows.purpose: Modals, drawers, elevated overlays. Higher placement, not heavier weight.

shadows.name: focus-ring
shadows.purpose: Focus treatment on light surfaces. This IS the focus ring — no outline needed.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Default easing for state transitions (0.3s). Material standard curve — ease out with a subtle ease in.

motion.name: duration-standard
motion.purpose: Panel transitions, card hovers, most UI motion.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The primary CTA. Rose fill, white text, rounded (12px). Maximum one per screen.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; background: #f06090; color: #ffffff; padding: 12px 24px; border-radius: 12px; font-family: system-ui, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, sans-serif; font-size: 15px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.4; border: none; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1), box-shadow 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #f78fb0; box-shadow: 0 4px 24px rgba(240,96,144,0.4); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #f06090; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-primary:active { background: #d04070; transform: translateY(1px); } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity: 0.4; cursor: not-allowed; } @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) { .ds-btn-primary { transition: none; } }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Secondary action button. Transparent fill, rose border and text.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; background: transparent; color: #f06090; padding: 12px 24px; border-radius: 12px; font-family: system-ui, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, sans-serif; font-size: 15px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.4; border: 1px solid #f06090; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1), box-shadow 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: rgba(240,96,144,0.08); box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(240,96,144,0.2); } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #f06090; outline-offset: 2px; } @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) { .ds-btn-ghost { transition: none; } }

components.name: Light Card
components.description: Standard product view card. Surface background, rose border, 16px radius.
components.html:
Today's Target

Complete your weekly review and set tomorrow's priority.
components.css: .ds-card-light { background: #fff8fa; border: 1px solid #f5c0cc; border-radius: 16px; padding: 20px; font-family: system-ui, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, sans-serif; box-shadow: 0 4px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.06); transition: box-shadow 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-card-light:hover { box-shadow: 0 4px 24px rgba(240,96,144,0.15); } .ds-card-title { margin: 0 0 8px; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 500; color: #3d1020; line-height: 1.3; } .ds-card-body { margin: 0; font-size: 14px; color: #8a5060; line-height: 1.45; } @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) { .ds-card-light { transition: none; } }

components.name: Dark Shell Panel
components.description: Panel in the dark app shell. Obsidian mid background, no border, tonal hover.
components.html:
Phase 2

Build the foundation you committed to in week one.
components.css: .ds-panel-dark { background: #240d16; border-radius: 16px; padding: 20px; font-family: system-ui, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, sans-serif; transition: background 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-panel-dark:hover { background: #2e101c; } .ds-panel-title { margin: 0 0 8px; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 500; color: #fff0f4; line-height: 1.3; } .ds-panel-body { margin: 0; font-size: 14px; color: #b08090; line-height: 1.45; } @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) { .ds-panel-dark { transition: none; } }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Form input on light surfaces. Rose focus glow, no outline.
components.css: .ds-field { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 6px; font-family: system-ui, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, sans-serif; } .ds-label { font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; color: #3d1020; letter-spacing: 0.02em; } .ds-input { background: #fff8fa; border: 1px solid #f5c0cc; border-radius: 12px; padding: 12px 16px; font-family: inherit; font-size: 16px; color: #3d1020; line-height: 1.45; transition: border-color 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1), box-shadow 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); outline: none; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #b08090; } .ds-input:focus { border-color: #f06090; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(240,96,144,0.2); } @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) { .ds-input { transition: none; } }

components.name: Navigation Item
components.description: Sidebar nav item on dark shell. Active state uses Petal fill.
components.html: Vision BoardDaily
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 4px; padding: 8px; } .ds-nav-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; padding: 10px 16px; border-radius: 10px; font-family: system-ui, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; color: #b08090; text-decoration: none; transition: color 0.2s, background 0.2s; } .ds-nav-item:hover { color: #fff0f4; background: #2e101c; } .ds-nav-item--active { color: #f06090; background: rgba(240,96,144,0.12); } @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) { .ds-nav-item { transition: none; } }

components.name: Sage Bubble
components.description: Sage coaching message. Rose gradient background, white text. The most expressive element in the UI.
components.html: I noticed you haven't logged a reflection this week. What's one thing you're avoiding?
components.css: .ds-sage-bubble { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #f78fb0, #d04070); color: #ffffff; border-radius: 16px 16px 16px 4px; padding: 14px 18px; font-family: system-ui, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, sans-serif; font-size: 15px; line-height: 1.55; max-width: 320px; box-shadow: 0 0 40px rgba(240,96,144,0.3); }

narrative.overview:
Phasr is not a productivity tool with a pretty skin. It is a complete system for following through on a life vision — and it should look and feel like one. The UI runs on two registers simultaneously: a dark Obsidian shell (the structure, the backbone, the app) wrapping lighter surface views where the actual work happens. The contrast is intentional. The shell holds you. The surfaces breathe.

Everything is confident and warm. Buttons know what they are. Cards don't apologize for taking up space. The rose accent (Petal) is used with authority, not decoration — it marks the things that matter, not the things that merely exist. The system should feel like a woman who has figured herself out designed it for women who are in the process of doing the same.

This system explicitly rejects the corporate productivity aesthetic (cold, utilitarian, team-facing), the hustle-culture fitness app (aggressive gamification, leaderboard anxiety), and the ambient wellness app (soft, passive, nothing gets done). Phasr is aesthetic but with teeth.
keyCharacteristics: Dual-surface: deep Obsidian shell + warm light product views
Rose (Petal) accent used sparingly and with authority
Rounded corners (12–16px) that feel considered, not fluffy
Ambient glow and soft shadow as depth vocabulary — never decorative chrome
System font only — legibility over typographic showmanship
Motion: responsive and purposeful; transitions ≤ 0.3s; always reduced-motion safe

rules.name: The Petal Authority Rule
rules.body: Petal (#f06090) appears on no more than one primary interactive element per screen. When everything glows rose, nothing does.

rules.name: The Thread Rule
rules.body: The Petal accent crosses both dark and light surfaces unchanged. It is the one constant. Never substitute a lighter or darker rose on light surfaces — the same #f06090 works on both registers.

rules.name: The No-Display Rule
rules.body: No decorative display font inside product views. Headlines are structural, not expressive. Expressiveness lives in color, spacing, and Sage's copy voice.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces rest flat. Shadows appear only as a response to state: hover, focus, or modal elevation. No decorative lifted card shadows on idle content.

dos: Do use Petal (#f06090) on exactly one primary CTA per screen — its rarity is its authority
Do verify ≥ 4.5:1 contrast for all body text; ≥ 3:1 for large text
Do use Obsidian tonal steps (mid → lift) for hover states in dark surfaces instead of box shadows
Do wrap every animation and transition in @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce)
Do use text-wrap: balance on all h1–h3 for even line breaks
Do keep body copy ≤ 65ch line length on desktop views
Do match Sage's copy voice: warm, direct, no motivational filler
Do use the rose border-glow (0 0 0 3px rgba(240, 96, 144, 0.2)) as the primary focus treatment on light surfaces
donts: Don't use Notion's neutral grey-on-white utilitarian aesthetic — Phasr is personal and warm, not a work tool
Don't add leaderboards, aggressive streak counters, or comparative metrics — that's Nike Run; Phasr motivates without punishing
Don't make the interface soft, ambient, or passive — no gradient-fades-to-nothing, no Calm-inspired spacing that makes action feel optional
Don't use generic self-help visual language: no gold serif on cream, no motivational poster aesthetics
Don't add border-left greater than 1px as a colored stripe accent
Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text) — Phasr's type is solid and confident
Don't force uppercase on labels — sentence case only
Don't use pure white (#ffffff) as a background in product views — always Surface (#fff8fa) or Surface Warm (#fff0f4)
